title: Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Natco Pharma South Asia Partners:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma South Asia Partners!
